name: igl_sigma_chr3
description: Zebrafish IGL sigma cluster on chr3 — teleost-specific light chain isotype with VJ-C linkage (multiple V-J-C cassettes rather than mammalian-style VJ recombination across the whole locus). Zebrafish Ig isotypes (IgM/IgD/IgZ) differ from mammalian. Intra-cluster paralog identity 70-95% in V segments; PSVs are essential for correct V-gene assignment.
expected_copy_count: 1 locus, VDJ-rearranged per B cell; ~40-50 VH/VL gene segments
